title: croton seretii
intro: Croton seretii, also known as the Malaysian or Borneo Croton, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton seretii include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of fever and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve extracting the roots and leaves to create infusions, decoctions, or ointments for topical application.
